programme.title: Stefanos Tsitsipas (GRE) vs Raphael Collignon (BEL) - Final - ATP 250 EFG Swiss Open Gstaad 2026
programme.desc: Set against the Alpine backdrop of Gstaad, the EFG Swiss Open Gstaad 2026 brings ATP 250 clay-court action to one of the Tour’s most distinctive venues, as players compete for the title and valuable ranking points in a historic Swiss tournament.

programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Generali Open 2026
programme.desc: The Generali Open 2026 is an ATP 250 clay-court event held in Kitzbühel, Austria, from 20 to 25 July. Staged at the Kitzbühel Tennis Stadium and offering €612,620 in prize money, the tournament is one of the ATP Tour’s traditional Alpine stops, with players competing for the title on outdoor clay.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Manchester City - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 32

programme.title: Manchester United vs Leeds United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: Manchester United are unbeaten in their last 18 home league games against Leeds since a 1-0 loss in February 1981 under Dave Sexton. Following their 1-1 draw at Elland Road in January, Leeds are looking to avoid losing both league meetings with Manchester United in a season for the first time since 1994-95.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Aston Villa - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 32

programme.title: Day 7 - Final - ATP 250 EFG Swiss Open Gstaad 2026
programme.desc: Set against the Alpine backdrop of Gstaad, the EFG Swiss Open Gstaad 2026 brings ATP 250 clay-court action to one of the Tour’s most distinctive venues, as players compete for the title and valuable ranking points in a historic Swiss tournament.

programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Millennium Estoril Open 2026
programme.desc: The Millennium Estoril Open 2026 marks the tournament’s return to ATP 250 status in Portugal, running from 20 to 26 July in Estoril. Played on clay, it stands as the country’s only ATP Tour event, bringing international players to one of Portugal’s leading tennis stages.
